title: Spiranthes rodriguesii
taxonomy: Spiranthes rodriguesii is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. Spiranthes rodriguesii is a part of the tribe Arethuseae and is known for its unique, spiraling flowers. The species is native to the Americas and is often found in wetland areas. Through its classification, scientists can better understand the evolutionary history and relationships between different orchid species.
